$schema: Runefort welcome / demo fort. Forkable. Loaded on first visit when the fort registry is empty.
title: Welcome to Runefort

rooms.label: A spatial authoring environment for tile-grid web apps.
rooms.body: Declare rooms, claims, neighbors, and state bindings. The runtime compiles them into a CSS grid you can edit, refine, and run — all in the browser.

rooms.label: rooms
rooms.body: Tiles in the grid. Position, size, label, content. Click a tile to open it; refine it via LLM.

rooms.label: claims
rooms.body: Optional file or content regions a room owns. View and edit them inline — no jumping to an external editor.

rooms.label: neighbors
rooms.body: Adjacency between rooms. Drives keyboard nav (h/j/k/l) and connecting lines.

rooms.label: state bindings
rooms.body: How runtime signals color a tile. cold · warm · hot · fault · idle. Live updates without a reload.

rooms.label: edit in place
rooms.body: Tile content opens inside the room. Author, refine, and inspect without leaving the page.

rooms.label: diffable
rooms.body: Layouts live in version control as text. Reviews become readable. SVG graphs cannot do this.

rooms.label: extensible by composition
rooms.body: Apps add vocabularies (supervisor, dashboard, wiki) on top of the four primitives. The protocol stays small.

rooms.label: no runtime layout engine
rooms.body: All layout is compile-time deterministic. No d3, no dagre, no jitter.

rooms.label: 1 · Fork this fort
rooms.body: Click “Fork to start editing” above. A copy lands in your local storage and you can edit it freely.

rooms.label: 2 · Set API key
rooms.body: Click ⚙ Settings, paste your OpenRouter key, save. Required to author with an LLM.

rooms.label: 3 · Generate
rooms.body: Click + room / + floor / + building / + campus to author. Click any tile and “refine selected” to iterate.

rooms.label: hotkeys
rooms.body: Ctrl+Shift+R = + room  ·  F = + floor  ·  B = + building  ·  C = + campus  ·  E = refine

rooms.label: ⚠ API key in localStorage
rooms.body: Any script on this page can read it. Never use a shared kiosk. Sign in (coming soon) to use a server-proxied key instead.

rooms.label: cost cap = $5
rooms.body: Default budget. Adjust in Settings. Each generation ≈ $0.005–$0.05.
